name: FAI_SAM_RAW_PAYROLL_FLOW
description: This table holds the payroll flow data

columns.Name: RAW_PAYROLL_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key Payroll Raw Process Table

columns.Name: PARENT_ID_METRIC
columns.Comments: Parent Process id in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: ACTIVITY
columns.Comments: Payroll Activity in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: TASK_GROUP
columns.Comments: Payroll Task Group in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: KEY
columns.Comments: Key of the ESS in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: ACTION_NAME
columns.Comments: Payroll Action Name in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: FLOW_NAME
columns.Comments: Payroll Flow Name in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start Time of the Process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: DAY
columns.Comments: Day of the process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the Process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: LOAD
columns.Comments: Number Of Record in Process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: LOAD_IN_ERROR
columns.Comments: Number of Record loaded in Error by the process

columns.Name: PROCESSING_TIME
columns.Comments: Time of the Processing in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: THREAD_COUNT
columns.Comments: Threadcount of the process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: ID_METRIC
columns.Comments: Request Id of the Process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: Stop Time of the Process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: PARAMETER
columns.Comments: Parameter of the process in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: FLOW_PATTERN_NAME
columns.Comments: Payroll Flow Pattern Name in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: FLOW_TASK_NAME
columns.Comments: Payroll Flow Task Name in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: The Payroll Id in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ACTION_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Payroll Action Effective Date in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ACTION_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Payroll Action Start Date in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ACTION_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Payroll Action End Date in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: BASE_ACTIVITY
columns.Comments: Payroll Base Activity in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: BASE_TASK_GROUP
columns.Comments: Payroll Base Task Group in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: BASE_TASK_NAME
columns.Comments: Payroll Base Task Name in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: BASE_ACTION_NAME
columns.Comments: Base Action Name in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Action Id in Raw Payroll Table

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES TABLE

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
